result.observation: APF intercepts POST requests to Gemini API endpoints causing HTTP2 protocol errors and connection closures. Page remains on welcome screen with prompt text still in input. No APF warning page or message displayed to user.

notes: Phase3-B4 retest #3 after etapd restart and DB template memory reflection. Same result as #098/#102 - block works but no warning. Submission method: set clipboard via PowerShell, Ctrl+V paste into input (Angular recognized), then JS console button.click() to submit.
